features: Modern admin UI redesign with card-based layout
Full German translation coverage (451 strings)
Fixed broken translation calls
PHP 8.x compatibility fix for plugin loading order
Admin notice when license key is about to expire
Full bleed mode for edge-to-edge PDF ticket backgrounds
Subscription expiration check in premium detection
Seating plan features

Updated plugin update checker library
Order tickets QR code display fix
Tracked IPs display on ticket details
Display redeemed ticket count at scanner
Display non-redeemed ticket count at scanner
WooCommerce HPOS support for meta boxes
Multiple ticket templates per product or list
Exclusion days for day chooser tickets
No-show logs within product detail view
Hide ticket details before event start
Deny redeem after event started
Auto-redeem all tickets by order status
